dc:title: Wooded road with touring bicycle and property sign
dc:description: A single adult figure stands on an unpaved rural road bordered by dense trees and undergrowth. The person is positioned slightly right of center, facing the camera, with the face obscured, and wears sleeveless upper clothing, cropped trousers, socks, and shoes. A loaded touring bicycle rests nearby against vegetation and a fence on the right side of the road; attached bags and a cylindrical roll are visible on the bicycle. The road recedes into a shaded, tunnel-like corridor formed by overhanging branches and earthen banks. On the right, a chain-link fence supports a white sign reading “PROPRIETÀ UNIVERSITÀ AGRARIA DI ISOLA FARNESE.” Fallen leaves and dappled sunlight are visible on the road surface.
condition_note: Colors unverified; image programmatically inverted from faded source negative.
